query:
SELECT c.id, c.human_mode, c.human_mode_until, cu.phone, cu.name 
FROM conversations c 
JOIN customers cu ON c.customer_id = cu.id 
WHERE c.human_mode = 1 
ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
